articles.title: Samuel Adams launches new ‘Our City. Our Beer.’ variety pack inspired by Boston sports stars
articles.description:
The new pack features four beers inspired by Derrick White, Garrett Crochet, Julian Edelman, and Zdeno Chara.

The post Samuel Adams launches new ‘Our City. Our Beer.’ variety pack inspired by Boston sports stars appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Samuel Adams introduces ‘Our City. Our Beer.’ variety pack featuring four local sports stars.
Beers inspired by Derrick White, Garrett Crochet, Julian Edelman, and Zdeno Chara launched on March 11, 2026.
Local residents can celebrate Boston sports culture through unique beer flavors and community engagement.

articles.title: Court hearing for Cher’s son on charges he broke into a New Hampshire home canceled
articles.description:
Elijah Allman’s arrest on March 1 was his second in New Hampshire in a matter of days.

The post Court hearing for Cher’s son on charges he broke into a New Hampshire home canceled appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Court hearing for Elijah Allman, Cher's son, was canceled on March 11.
Allman was arrested on March 1 for breaking into a New Hampshire home.
This incident marks Allman's second arrest in New Hampshire within days.
